SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`Website`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`IconUrl`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `p`.`Id`, `p`.`ContentType`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`EscapeRoomId`, `p`.`FileName`, `p`.`FileSize`, `p`.`Url`, `s0`.`Id`, `s0`.`Comment`, `s0`.`CreatedAt`, `s0`.`DeletedAt`, `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s0`.`IsVerified`, `s0`.`PlayersCount`, `s0`.`Rating`, `s0`.`UserId`, `s0`.`VisitedAt`, `s0`.`Id0`, `s0`.`DeletedAt0`, `s0`.`Email`, `s0`.`RegisteredAt`, `s0`.`Role`, `s0`.`TotalRoomsPlayed`, `s0`.`Username`
FROM `EscapeRooms` AS `e`
INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `e0`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e0`.`ThemesId`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e0`
    INNER JOIN `Themes` AS `t` ON `e0`.`ThemesId` = `t`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `e`.`Id` = `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`
LEFT JOIN `Photos` AS `p` ON `e`.`Id` = `p`.`EscapeRoomId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`UserId`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `u`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `u`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`RegisteredAt`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`TotalRoomsPlayed`, `u`.`Username`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    INNER JOIN `Users` AS `u` ON `r`.`UserId` = `u`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s0` ON `e`.`Id` = `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`
WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `e`.`Id`, `l`.`Id`, `c`.`Id`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id`, `p`.`Id`, `s0`.`Id`

SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`CompanyId`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Difficulty`, `s`.`LocationId`, `s`.`MaxPlayers`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`Price`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`
FROM `Themes` AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e0`.`Id`, `e0`.`CompanyId`, `e0`.`CreatedAt`, `e0`.`DeletedAt`, `e0`.`Description`, `e0`.`Difficulty`, `e0`.`LocationId`, `e0`.`MaxPlayers`, `e0`.`Name`, `e0`.`Price`, `e`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e`.`ThemesId`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e0` ON `e`.`EscapeRoomsId` = `e0`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `t`.`Id` = `s`.`ThemesId`
WHERE `t`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `t`.`Id`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`

) AS `s0` ON `e`.`Id` = `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`
WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL AND (`e`.`Id` = @__id_0)
    LIMIT 1
) AS `s`

    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

    SELECT `e0`.`Id`, `e0`.`CompanyId`, `e0`.`CreatedAt`, `e0`.`DeletedAt`, `e0`.`Description`, `e0`.`Difficulty`, `e0`.`LocationId`, `e0`.`MaxPlayers`, `e0`.`Name`, `e0`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`, `e`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e`.`ThemesId`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id2`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt2`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`UserId`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e0` ON `e`.`EscapeRoomsId` = `e0`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e0`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`

    WHERE `e0`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `t`.`Id` = `s`.`ThemesId`
WHERE `t`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`Website`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`IconUrl`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `p`.`Id`, `p`.`ContentType`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`EscapeRoomId`, `p`.`FileName`, `p`.`FileSize`, `p`.`Url`, `s0`.`Id`, `s0`.`Comment`, `s0`.`CreatedAt`, `s0`.`DeletedAt`, `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s0`.`IsVerified`, `s0`.`PlayersCount`, `s0`.`Rating`, `s0`.`UserId`, `s0`.`VisitedAt`, `s0`.`Id0`, `s0`.`DeletedAt0`, `s0`.`Email`, `s0`.`RegisteredAt`, `s0`.`Role`, `s0`.`TotalRoomsPlayed`, `s0`.`Username`
FROM `EscapeRooms` AS `e`
INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `e0`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e0`.`ThemesId`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e0`
    INNER JOIN `Themes` AS `t` ON `e0`.`ThemesId` = `t`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `e`.`Id` = `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`
LEFT JOIN `Photos` AS `p` ON `e`.`Id` = `p`.`EscapeRoomId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`UserId`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `u`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `u`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`RegisteredAt`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`TotalRoomsPlayed`, `u`.`Username`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    INNER JOIN `Users` AS `u` ON `r`.`UserId` = `u`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s0` ON `e`.`Id` = `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`
WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `e`.`Id`, `l`.`Id`, `c`.`Id`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id`, `p`.`Id`, `s0`.`Id`

FROM `Themes` AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e0`.`Id`, `e0`.`CompanyId`, `e0`.`CreatedAt`, `e0`.`DeletedAt`, `e0`.`Description`, `e0`.`Difficulty`, `e0`.`LocationId`, `e0`.`MaxPlayers`, `e0`.`Name`, `e0`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`, `e`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e`.`ThemesId`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id2`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt2`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`UserId`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`

) AS `s` ON `t`.`Id` = `s`.`ThemesId`

    SELECT `e0`.`Id`, `e0`.`CompanyId`, `e0`.`CreatedAt`, `e0`.`DeletedAt`, `e0`.`Description`, `e0`.`Difficulty`, `e0`.`LocationId`, `e0`.`MaxPlayers`, `e0`.`Name`, `e0`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`, `e`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e`.`ThemesId`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id2`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt2`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`UserId`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e0` ON `e`.`EscapeRoomsId` = `e0`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e0`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e0`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`UserId`, `r`.`VisitedAt`
        FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
        WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
    ) AS `r0` ON `e0`.`Id` = `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`
    WHERE `e0`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `t`.`Id` = `s`.`ThemesId`
WHERE `t`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `t`.`Id`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Id1`

) AS `s0` ON `e`.`Id` = `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`
WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`Website`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`IconUrl`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `p`.`Id`, `p`.`ContentType`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`EscapeRoomId`, `p`.`FileName`, `p`.`FileSize`, `p`.`Url`, `s0`.`Id`, `s0`.`Comment`, `s0`.`CreatedAt`, `s0`.`DeletedAt`, `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s0`.`IsVerified`, `s0`.`PlayersCount`, `s0`.`Rating`, `s0`.`UserId`, `s0`.`VisitedAt`, `s0`.`Id0`, `s0`.`DeletedAt0`, `s0`.`Email`, `s0`.`RegisteredAt`, `s0`.`Role`, `s0`.`TotalRoomsPlayed`, `s0`.`Username`
FROM `EscapeRooms` AS `e`
INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `e0`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e0`.`ThemesId`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e0`
    INNER JOIN `Themes` AS `t` ON `e0`.`ThemesId` = `t`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `e`.`Id` = `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`
LEFT JOIN `Photos` AS `p` ON `e`.`Id` = `p`.`EscapeRoomId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`UserId`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `u`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `u`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`RegisteredAt`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`TotalRoomsPlayed`, `u`.`Username`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    INNER JOIN `Users` AS `u` ON `r`.`UserId` = `u`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s0` ON `e`.`Id` = `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`
WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `e`.`Id`, `l`.`Id`, `c`.`Id`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id`, `p`.`Id`, `s0`.`Id`

SELECT `u`.`Id`, `u`.`DeletedAt`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`RegisteredAt`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`TotalRoomsPlayed`, `u`.`Username`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Comment`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s`.`IsVerified`, `s`.`PlayersCount`, `s`.`Rating`, `s`.`UserId`, `s`.`VisitedAt`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`CompanyId`, `s`.`CreatedAt0`, `s`.`DeletedAt0`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Difficulty`, `s`.`LocationId`, `s`.`MaxPlayers`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`Price`, `s`.`Id1`, `s`.`Address`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`DeletedAt1`, `s`.`Latitude`, `s`.`Longitude`, `s`.`PostalCode`, `s`.`Id2`, `s`.`DeletedAt2`, `s`.`Name0`, `s`.`Website`
FROM `Users` AS `u`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`UserId`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `e`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `e`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id2`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt2`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `u`.`Id` = `s`.`UserId`
WHERE `u`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `u`.`Id`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Id1`

FROM `Users` AS `u`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`UserId`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `e`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `e`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id2`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt2`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `u`.`Id` = `s`.`UserId`
WHERE `u`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `u`.`Id`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Id1`

WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

FROM `Themes` AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e0`.`Id`, `e0`.`CompanyId`, `e0`.`CreatedAt`, `e0`.`DeletedAt`, `e0`.`Description`, `e0`.`Difficulty`, `e0`.`LocationId`, `e0`.`MaxPlayers`, `e0`.`Name`, `e0`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`, `e`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e`.`ThemesId`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id2`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt2`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`UserId`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e0` ON `e`.`EscapeRoomsId` = `e0`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e0`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e0`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`UserId`, `r`.`VisitedAt`

        WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
    ) AS `r0` ON `e0`.`Id` = `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`
    WHERE `e0`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `t`.`Id` = `s`.`ThemesId`
WHERE `t`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `t`.`Id`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Id1`

SELECT `u`.`Id`, `u`.`DeletedAt`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`RegisteredAt`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`TotalRoomsPlayed`, `u`.`Username`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Comment`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s`.`IsVerified`, `s`.`PlayersCount`, `s`.`Rating`, `s`.`UserId`, `s`.`VisitedAt`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`CompanyId`, `s`.`CreatedAt0`, `s`.`DeletedAt0`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Difficulty`, `s`.`LocationId`, `s`.`MaxPlayers`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`Price`, `s`.`Id1`, `s`.`Address`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`DeletedAt1`, `s`.`Latitude`, `s`.`Longitude`, `s`.`PostalCode`, `s`.`Id2`, `s`.`DeletedAt2`, `s`.`Name0`, `s`.`Website`
FROM `Users` AS `u`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`UserId`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `e`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `e`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id2`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt2`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `u`.`Id` = `s`.`UserId`
WHERE `u`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `u`.`Id`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Id1`

    SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`
    FROM `EscapeRooms` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL AND (`e`.`Id` = @__id_0)
    LIMIT 1
) AS `s`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `e0`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e0`.`ThemesId`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e0`
    INNER JOIN `Themes` AS `t` ON `e0`.`ThemesId` = `t`.`Id`
) AS `s0` ON `s`.`Id` = `s0`.`EscapeRoomsId`
LEFT JOIN `Photos` AS `p` ON `s`.`Id` = `p`.`EscapeRoomId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `a`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`RegisteredAt`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s1` ON `s`.`Id` = `s1`.`EscapeRoomId`
ORDER BY `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Id1`, `s0`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s0`.`ThemesId`, `s0`.`Id`, `p`.`Id`, `s1`.`Id`

SELECT `a0`.`Id`, `a0`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a0`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a0`.`Email`, `a0`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a0`.`FirstName`, `a0`.`LastName`, `a0`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a0`.`LockoutEnd`, `a0`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a0`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a0`.`PasswordHash`, `a0`.`PhoneNumber`, `a0`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a0`.`RegisteredAt`, `a0`.`SecurityStamp`, `a0`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a0`.`UserName`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`AppUserId`, `s`.`Comment`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s`.`IsVerified`, `s`.`PlayersCount`, `s`.`Rating`, `s`.`VisitedAt`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`CompanyId`, `s`.`CreatedAt0`, `s`.`DeletedAt0`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Difficulty`, `s`.`LocationId`, `s`.`MaxPlayers`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`Price`
FROM (
    SELECT `a`.`Id`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`RegisteredAt`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`
    FROM `AspNetUsers` AS `a`
    WHERE `a`.`Id` = @__id_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `a0`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `e`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `e`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `a0`.`Id` = `s`.`AppUserId`
ORDER BY `a0`.`Id`, `s`.`Id`

SELECT `r`.`Id`, `e`.`Name` AS `RoomName`, CASE
    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`UserName`, '')
    ELSE ''
END AS `Username`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`IsVerified`
FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

FROM `Locations` AS `l`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `r0`.`AppUserId`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRooms` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`
        FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
        WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
    ) AS `r0` ON `e`.`Id` = `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`
    WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `l`.`Id` = `s`.`LocationId`
WHERE `l`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `l`.`Id`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`

    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e0`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e0`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`

    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`UserName`, '')

    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `a`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`RegisteredAt`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s0` ON `e`.`Id` = `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`
WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `e`.`Id`, `l`.`Id`, `c`.`Id`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id`, `p`.`Id`, `s0`.`Id`

SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`CompanyId`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Difficulty`, `s`.`LocationId`, `s`.`MaxPlayers`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`Price`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Address`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`DeletedAt0`, `s`.`Latitude`, `s`.`Longitude`, `s`.`PostalCode`, `s`.`Id1`, `s`.`DeletedAt1`, `s`.`Name0`, `s`.`Website`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id2`, `s`.`AppUserId`, `s`.`Comment`, `s`.`CreatedAt0`, `s`.`DeletedAt2`, `s`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s`.`IsVerified`, `s`.`PlayersCount`, `s`.`Rating`, `s`.`VisitedAt`
FROM `Themes` AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e0`.`Id`, `e0`.`CompanyId`, `e0`.`CreatedAt`, `e0`.`DeletedAt`, `e0`.`Description`, `e0`.`Difficulty`, `e0`.`LocationId`, `e0`.`MaxPlayers`, `e0`.`Name`, `e0`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`, `e`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e`.`ThemesId`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id2`, `r0`.`AppUserId`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt2`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e0` ON `e`.`EscapeRoomsId` = `e0`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e0`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e0`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`
        FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
        WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
    ) AS `r0` ON `e0`.`Id` = `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`

    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`UserName`, '')

INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`

    SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `e0`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e0`.`ThemesId`

    LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`Website`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`IconUrl`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `p`.`Id`, `p`.`ContentType`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`EscapeRoomId`, `p`.`FileName`, `p`.`FileSize`, `p`.`Url`, `s0`.`Id`, `s0`.`AppUserId`, `s0`.`Comment`, `s0`.`CreatedAt`, `s0`.`DeletedAt`, `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s0`.`IsVerified`, `s0`.`PlayersCount`, `s0`.`Rating`, `s0`.`VisitedAt`, `s0`.`Id0`, `s0`.`AccessFailedCount`, `s0`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `s0`.`DeletedAt0`, `s0`.`Email`, `s0`.`EmailConfirmed`, `s0`.`FirstName`, `s0`.`LastName`, `s0`.`LockoutEnabled`, `s0`.`LockoutEnd`, `s0`.`NormalizedEmail`, `s0`.`NormalizedUserName`, `s0`.`PasswordHash`, `s0`.`PhoneNumber`, `s0`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `s0`.`RegisteredAt`, `s0`.`SecurityStamp`, `s0`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `s0`.`UserName`
FROM `EscapeRooms` AS `e`
INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `e0`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e0`.`ThemesId`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e0`
    INNER JOIN `Themes` AS `t` ON `e0`.`ThemesId` = `t`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `e`.`Id` = `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`
LEFT JOIN `Photos` AS `p` ON `e`.`Id` = `p`.`EscapeRoomId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `a`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`RegisteredAt`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s0` ON `e`.`Id` = `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`
WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `e`.`Id`, `l`.`Id`, `c`.`Id`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id`, `p`.`Id`, `s0`.`Id`

    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`

2026-06-29 10:35:21.312 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `r`.`Id`, `e`.`Name` AS `RoomName`, CASE
    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`UserName`, '')
    ELSE ''
END AS `Username`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`IsVerified`

SELECT `r`.`Id`, `e`.`Name` AS `RoomName`, CASE
    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`UserName`, '')
    ELSE ''
END AS `Username`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`IsVerified`
FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

SELECT `r`.`Id`, `e`.`Name` AS `RoomName`, CASE
    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`UserName`, '')
    ELSE ''
END AS `Username`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`IsVerified`

INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `e0`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e0`.`ThemesId`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e0`
    INNER JOIN `Themes` AS `t` ON `e0`.`ThemesId` = `t`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `e`.`Id` = `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`
LEFT JOIN `Photos` AS `p` ON `e`.`Id` = `p`.`EscapeRoomId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `a`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `a`.`DisplayName`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`RegisteredAt`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
    LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s0` ON `e`.`Id` = `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`
WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

2026-06-29 10:46:14.069 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `l`.`Id`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`CompanyId`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Difficulty`, `s`.`LocationId`, `s`.`MaxPlayers`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`Price`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`DeletedAt0`, `s`.`Name0`, `s`.`Website`, `s`.`Id1`, `s`.`AppUserId`, `s`.`Comment`, `s`.`CreatedAt0`, `s`.`DeletedAt1`, `s`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s`.`IsVerified`, `s`.`PlayersCount`, `s`.`Rating`, `s`.`VisitedAt`
FROM `Locations` AS `l`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `r0`.`AppUserId`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRooms` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`
        FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
        WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
    ) AS `r0` ON `e`.`Id` = `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`
    WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `l`.`Id` = `s`.`LocationId`
WHERE `l`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `l`.`Id`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`

SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`CompanyId`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Difficulty`, `s`.`LocationId`, `s`.`MaxPlayers`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`Price`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Address`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`DeletedAt0`, `s`.`Latitude`, `s`.`Longitude`, `s`.`PostalCode`, `s`.`Id1`, `s`.`DeletedAt1`, `s`.`Name0`, `s`.`Website`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id2`, `s`.`AppUserId`, `s`.`Comment`, `s`.`CreatedAt0`, `s`.`DeletedAt2`, `s`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s`.`IsVerified`, `s`.`PlayersCount`, `s`.`Rating`, `s`.`VisitedAt`
FROM `Themes` AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e0`.`Id`, `e0`.`CompanyId`, `e0`.`CreatedAt`, `e0`.`DeletedAt`, `e0`.`Description`, `e0`.`Difficulty`, `e0`.`LocationId`, `e0`.`MaxPlayers`, `e0`.`Name`, `e0`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`, `e`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e`.`ThemesId`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id2`, `r0`.`AppUserId`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt2`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e0` ON `e`.`EscapeRoomsId` = `e0`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e0`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e0`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`
        FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
        WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
    ) AS `r0` ON `e0`.`Id` = `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`
    WHERE `e0`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `t`.`Id` = `s`.`ThemesId`
WHERE `t`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `t`.`Id`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Id1`

FROM `Locations` AS `l`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `r0`.`AppUserId`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRooms` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`

    WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `l`.`Id` = `s`.`LocationId`
WHERE `l`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e0`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`

LEFT JOIN (

    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e0`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e0`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`

SELECT `r`.`Id`, `e`.`Name` AS `RoomName`, CASE
    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))
    ELSE ''
END AS `DisplayName`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`IsVerified`
FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

SELECT `r`.`Id`, `e`.`Name` AS `RoomName`, CASE
    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))
    ELSE ''
END AS `DisplayName`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`IsVerified`
FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `r`.`CreatedAt` DESC

FROM `Companies` AS `c`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `r0`.`AppUserId`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`

    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`

        WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

    WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `c`.`Id` = `s`.`CompanyId`
WHERE `c`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

SELECT `r`.`Id`, `e`.`Name` AS `RoomName`, CASE
    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))
    ELSE ''
END AS `DisplayName`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`IsVerified`
FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `r`.`CreatedAt` DESC

    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))
    ELSE ''

    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))

    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))

    SELECT `e0`.`Id`, `e0`.`CompanyId`, `e0`.`CreatedAt`, `e0`.`DeletedAt`, `e0`.`Description`, `e0`.`Difficulty`, `e0`.`LocationId`, `e0`.`MaxPlayers`, `e0`.`Name`, `e0`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `c`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `c`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `c`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c`.`Website`, `e`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e`.`ThemesId`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id2`, `r0`.`AppUserId`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt2`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRoomTheme` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e0` ON `e`.`EscapeRoomsId` = `e0`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e0`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `Companies` AS `c` ON `e0`.`CompanyId` = `c`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`
        FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
        WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
    ) AS `r0` ON `e0`.`Id` = `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`
    WHERE `e0`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `t`.`Id` = `s`.`ThemesId`
WHERE `t`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `t`.`Id`, `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `s`.`ThemesId`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Id1`

    SELECT `t`.`Id`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`IconUrl`, `t`.`Name`, `e0`.`EscapeRoomsId`, `e0`.`ThemesId`

    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))
    ELSE ''

SELECT `r`.`Id`, `e`.`Name` AS `RoomName`, CASE
    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))
    ELSE ''
END AS `DisplayName`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`IsVerified`
FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN `AspNetUsers` AS `a` ON `r`.`AppUserId` = `a`.`Id`
WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

    INNER JOIN `Themes` AS `t` ON `e0`.`ThemesId` = `t`.`Id`
) AS `s` ON `e`.`Id` = `s`.`EscapeRoomsId`
LEFT JOIN `Photos` AS `p` ON `e`.`Id` = `p`.`EscapeRoomId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`, `a`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `a`.`AccessFailedCount`, `a`.`ConcurrencyStamp`, `a`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `a`.`DisplayName`, `a`.`Email`, `a`.`EmailConfirmed`, `a`.`FirstName`, `a`.`LastName`, `a`.`LockoutEnabled`, `a`.`LockoutEnd`, `a`.`NormalizedEmail`, `a`.`NormalizedUserName`, `a`.`PasswordHash`, `a`.`PhoneNumber`, `a`.`PhoneNumberConfirmed`, `a`.`RegisteredAt`, `a`.`SecurityStamp`, `a`.`TwoFactorEnabled`, `a`.`UserName`
    FROM `Reviews` AS `r`

    WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s0` ON `e`.`Id` = `s0`.`EscapeRoomId`
WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))
    ELSE ''
END AS `DisplayName`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`IsVerified`
FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
INNER JOIN `EscapeRooms` AS `e` ON `r`.`EscapeRoomId` = `e`.`Id`

WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))

SELECT `r`.`Id`, `e`.`Name` AS `RoomName`, CASE
    WHEN `a`.`Id` IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(`a`.`DisplayName`, CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(`a`.`FirstName`, ''), ' '), COALESCE(`a`.`LastName`, '')))
    ELSE ''
END AS `DisplayName`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`IsVerified`

    SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `r0`.`AppUserId`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRooms` AS `e`

    WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL

SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`Website`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`CompanyId`, `s`.`CreatedAt`, `s`.`DeletedAt`, `s`.`Description`, `s`.`Difficulty`, `s`.`LocationId`, `s`.`MaxPlayers`, `s`.`Name`, `s`.`Price`, `s`.`Id0`, `s`.`Address`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`DeletedAt0`, `s`.`Latitude`, `s`.`Longitude`, `s`.`PostalCode`, `s`.`Id1`, `s`.`AppUserId`, `s`.`Comment`, `s`.`CreatedAt0`, `s`.`DeletedAt1`, `s`.`EscapeRoomId`, `s`.`IsVerified`, `s`.`PlayersCount`, `s`.`Rating`, `s`.`VisitedAt`
FROM `Companies` AS `c`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e`.`Id`, `e`.`CompanyId`, `e`.`CreatedAt`, `e`.`DeletedAt`, `e`.`Description`, `e`.`Difficulty`, `e`.`LocationId`, `e`.`MaxPlayers`, `e`.`Name`, `e`.`Price`, `l`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `l`.`Address`, `l`.`City`, `l`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt0`, `l`.`Latitude`, `l`.`Longitude`, `l`.`PostalCode`, `r0`.`Id` AS `Id1`, `r0`.`AppUserId`, `r0`.`Comment`, `r0`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `r0`.`DeletedAt` AS `DeletedAt1`, `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r0`.`IsVerified`, `r0`.`PlayersCount`, `r0`.`Rating`, `r0`.`VisitedAt`
    FROM `EscapeRooms` AS `e`
    INNER JOIN `Locations` AS `l` ON `e`.`LocationId` = `l`.`Id`
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT `r`.`Id`, `r`.`AppUserId`, `r`.`Comment`, `r`.`CreatedAt`, `r`.`DeletedAt`, `r`.`EscapeRoomId`, `r`.`IsVerified`, `r`.`PlayersCount`, `r`.`Rating`, `r`.`VisitedAt`
        FROM `Reviews` AS `r`
        WHERE `r`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
    ) AS `r0` ON `e`.`Id` = `r0`.`EscapeRoomId`
    WHERE `e`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
) AS `s` ON `c`.`Id` = `s`.`CompanyId`
WHERE `c`.`DeletedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY `c`.`Id`, `s`.`Id`, `s`.`Id0`
